old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-hwx9.4","title":"Define LICHEN fragmentation profile","description":"Make the SCHC draft authoritative for RFC 8724 ACK-on-Error: allocate directional RuleIDs; confirm M=1,N=6,T=0; choose WINDOW_SIZE, L2 word/padding, tile size, final-tile strategy, RCS placement/input, ACK timing/C/bitmap compression, retry limits, abort behavior, and capacity consistent with constrained C state.","acceptance_criteria":"Normative spec has no implementation ambiguity; all selected values have RFC citations and explicit wire diagrams.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-19T16:01:34.205592Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-19T16:01:34.205592Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-hwx9.4","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-hwx9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-19T16:01:34.351761Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Defined authoritative RFC 8724 ACK-on-Error profile in commit 03a7261be: hop-by-hop signed-link operation; RuleIDs 0x78/0x79; T=0/M=1/N=6; WINDOW_SIZE=63; true bit packing; 187-byte tiles; CRC/RCS, ACK compression, retry/abort/duplicate semantics; 1281-byte minimum buffer; Rule Set Version 2; aligned link/security specs. git diff --check passed; three final independent reviews reported no in-scope findings. typos unavailable locally.
